findings.requirement: Поиск в навбаре ищет по title, description, company
findings.issue: Search functionality is completely absent from the tech-spec. No task, no data layer function, no UI component addresses the navbar search. User-spec explicitly lists it as an acceptance criterion.
findings.recommendation: Add a task (likely Wave 2 or 3) for implementing search: server action or API route querying posts with ILIKE on title/description/company, search input in Navbar component with debounced query, results display. Could be client-side filtering for MVP if dataset is small enough.

findings.issue: No task covers creating the 10 required articles. Task 3 creates only one sample article. The user-spec states '≥10 статей опубликовано к моменту запуска' as an acceptance criterion. The tech-spec mentions agents creating articles but includes no concrete task for it.
findings.recommendation: Add a task (post Wave 2, after Task 7) for agents to create ≥10 MDX articles in content/articles/. Alternatively, document this as a parallel workstream outside the tech-spec scope and add a dependency note in Task 16 (deploy) that 10 articles must exist before launch.

findings.issue: User-spec requires 'лента вакансий + резюме из PostgreSQL, пагинация «Показать ещё»'. The tech-spec does not mention any pagination mechanism — no 'load more' button, no cursor-based or offset-based pagination, no task addresses this.
findings.recommendation: Add pagination logic to Task 9 (Feed filtering) or create a sub-task: implement 'Показать ещё' button with offset-based loading (e.g., load 20 posts initially, fetch next 20 on click). Server action or client-side fetch to /api/posts with offset param.

findings.requirement: Dark/Light тема с анимированным переключением (transition ≥200ms) через Tailwind dark: модификатор
findings.issue: Tech-spec mentions dark mode support via Tailwind dark: modifier (Decision 1) and E2E test for theme toggle, but does not specify the ≥200ms transition animation requirement from the user-spec. No task explicitly handles adding CSS transitions for theme switching.
findings.recommendation: Add to Task 2 (Tailwind config) or Task 4 (layout migration): ensure body/root element has 'transition-colors duration-200' or equivalent, so theme switches animate smoothly. Mention the ≥200ms requirement explicitly.

findings.issue: Tech-spec Task 8 creates /resumes/tag/{tagSlug} SEO pages, but user-spec only mentions /vacancies/{tag-slug} SEO pages. The user-spec does not request separate SEO tag pages for resumes.
findings.recommendation: Either remove /resumes/tag/{tagSlug} from Task 8 scope to match user-spec, or document it as a deliberate enhancement in User-Spec Deviations section. Given the low additional effort, keeping it is reasonable but should be documented.

findings.requirement: Ссылки «Разместить вакансию» и «Реклама» в футере — ведут на бота
findings.issue: Task 10 mentions 'Link + Разместить to @resume_vac_bot' but does not explicitly mention the footer links for 'Разместить вакансию' and 'Реклама' that user-spec requires. The description says 'Same for Footer' regarding dead link removal but doesn't specify adding these bot links.
findings.recommendation: Explicitly mention in Task 10 description: Footer must include 'Разместить вакансию' and 'Реклама' links pointing to https://t.me/resume_vac_bot.

findings.issue: User-spec MVP roadmap includes 'Модерация статей через TG-бота' but tech-spec describes articles as MDX files committed to git with no moderation flow mentioned. The actual flow (agents create → Тони approves → commit) is described in user-spec but not reflected in tech-spec tasks.
findings.recommendation: This is likely acceptable as the 'moderation' is the manual git approval process. Add a note in the Articles section of tech-spec clarifying that moderation = Тони reviews MDX drafts before they're committed to the repo.

summary: Tech-spec has 2 critical gaps: (1) navbar search functionality is completely missing despite being an explicit user-spec acceptance criterion, (2) no task covers creating the required ≥10 launch articles. Additionally, pagination ('Показать ещё') and theme transition animation (≥200ms) are not addressed. The overall architecture is sound — Tailwind migration strategy, tag system design, MDX articles approach, and SEO pages are well thought out. The /vacancies/tag/ URL deviation is properly documented. After addressing the 2 critical and 2 major findings, the tech-spec will have full bidirectional traceability with the user-spec.
